content.en:
"The Eternal Dao Seed has been raised to the limit, and it can't be continued to be improved!"

Ye Tian muttered.

He must now condense the Eternal Dao Seed Realm Spirit, so that he can break the limit of the Eternal Dao Seed and cultivate to the first level of the Eternal Realm God Realm.

"The Eternal Realm Spirit Fruit has not yet been conceived, but I have the Xuan Star Realm Snake Realm Spirit Inheritance, plus my foundation is extremely strong, the success rate will not be low, and I may be able to practice it directly. "

Ye Tian muttered.

If he couldn't practice, he would wait for the Eternal Realm Spirit Fruit to ripen and breed, and then cultivate the Xuan Star Realm Snake.

......

this day.

Ye Tian began to cultivate the technique of the Xuan Star Realm Snake, and gave birth to the Xuan Star Realm Snake as a realm spirit within the Eternal Dao Species.

The realm spirit consumes the origin power of the Eternal Dao Seed for condensation, and once the condensation fails, the Eternal Dao Seed will be very weak. Of course, "317" will be very weak if it succeeds in cohesion.

Under normal circumstances, the probability of success is very low, but with the Xuan Star Realm Snake Realm Spirit Inheritance Technique, the success rate will increase a lot.

"Let's get started!"

Ye Tian began to cultivate.

The technique of the Xuan Star Realm Snake was very complicated, but he had studied the Xuan Star Realm Snake Technique a long time ago, and now he had already thoroughly understood it.

Therefore, he directly began to cultivate the Xuan Star Realm Snake Technique.

With the passage of time, an illusory Xuan Star Realm snake gradually appeared in his Eternal Dao Species, and then began to absorb the power of the Eternal Dao Species, gradually growing the Xuan Star Realm Snake.

In this process, Ye Tian has been condensing the Xuan Star Realm Snake.

In this process, there must be no mistakes, otherwise the cultivation will fail, and there can be no interference.

Of course.

For the Eternal Realm Divine Realm, the most feared thing in this process is the problem of demon seeding, if it is the Eternal Realm Divine Realm where the problem of the Eternal Dao Seed is very large, then it is almost impossible to condense the realm spirit.

Because in the process of condensing the realm spirits, the eternal Dao seed will become weaker and weaker, and it is easy to turn into a demon seed.

Unless you can find some kind of treasure and suppress the demon seed of the eternal Dao seed, you can condense the realm spirit, and even if you fail, you will not become a demon seed.

If you are very blind, you will inevitably become a demon seed.

Some Eternal Realm God Realms had no preparation, and they also felt that their Eternal Dao Seed problem was not too big, so they took the risk of attacking the Demon Seed, but they failed and became a Demon Seed.

After becoming a demon seed, he is no longer himself, but another life form.

However, even if the risk is so great, many Eternal Realm God Realms are still willing to take risks, after all, once they break through, their strength will far surpass the present, and their status will be far higher than now.

Strength and status are what they are pursuing, and no one wants to stay at the bottom of the Eternal Realm God Realm all the time.

Ye Tian didn't have the problem of the Eternal Dao Seed, so it was impossible for him to become a demon.

So, he went all out to condense the Xuan Star Realm Snake.

Gradually, the Xuan Star Realm Snake became more and more condensed, and it was not far from being truly condensed, and his Eternal Dao Seed was also very weak.

I don't know how many years have passed.

Finally.

Rumble!!!!

A terrifying aura erupted from Ye Tian's body, which seemed to be weak, but contained terrifying coercion.

At the same time, a Xuan Star Realm Serpent Phantom appeared in his Eternal Dao Seed.

The terrifying phantom projection made many of the Eternal Dao realms of the Endless Realm Alliance tremble.

The other side.

Ye Xingchen looked at the position of Ye Tian's retreat: "Father, this is about to break through the !!!!"

Ye Xingchen was surprised, he also knew that the next step of the Eternal Realm Divine Realm was to condense the Eternal Realm Spirit, but he was still far from this step!

Ye Xingchen muttered.

Soon, he began to look forward to the day when he broke through.

......

I don't know how long it has been, Ye Tian's body has completed the transformation, and the strength of his body has transformed, but the Eternal Dao Seed is still very weak and needs a long time to recover.

During this period of time when the Eternal Dao Seed recovered, it was when he was at his weakest, and his combat strength was not even as good as before the breakthrough.

However, he did not panic in the slightest.

Other Eternal Realm God Realms may still want to hide, but he doesn't care, he has other copy bodies, and his combat power is still strong.

"If there is an Eternal Realm Spirit Fruit, I estimate that I can easily get through the period of weakness!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

In the following days, Ye Tian refined various resources, plus absorbed the energy of the Eternal Demon Pillar to restore his Eternal Dao Seed........

Gradually, the Eternal Dao Seed recovered, and it was able to continue to improve.

So, he used the Eternal Demon Pillar to continue to improve his Eternal Dao Species, and his strength was steadily improving.

And he also tested his strength, which was several times stronger than in the past, and with his current strength, he could easily beat his past self.

This is still a regular form of battle, if it is to urge the Xuan Star Realm Snake, then the combat power is far more than that.

The Xuan Star Realm Serpent is an eternal realm spirit, but it can not only be seen, but also has a terrible battle.

Any Eternal Realm Spirit has combat power, and it contains an Eternal Realm Spiritual Technique, and the power of the Eternal Realm Spiritual Technique can fully exert the power of the Eternal Dao Seed and the Eternal Realm Spirit, far surpassing the Eternal Dao Seed Secret Technique.

Of course, the Eternal Realm Spirituality of every Eternal Realm Spirit is fixed.

For example, the Eternal Realm Spiritual Technique of the Xuan Star Realm Snake is the Xuan Star Scale Armor Technique, once this Eternal Realm Spiritual Technique is activated, it will have an extremely terrifying defensive means, and it can also increase the strength of the physical body, making the attack much stronger.

Ye Tian estimated himself and the demon seed that frightened him in the abyss of despair, and now the strength of the comparison power, he was still invincible, but the gap was not big.

If he sends a few more copy bodies, he will really be able to suppress the other party if he joins forces.

"Don't worry, I just broke through, Eternal Dao Seed 1.8 has just recovered, in fact, it can be improved quickly for a period of time, and it will not slow down until it is improved to a certain extent. "

This is also the cultivation knowledge that Ye Tian learned from the Realm Court.

Therefore, he waited for his Eternal Dao Cultivation to slow down before going to the Abyss of Despair.

In this way, more than a billion years have passed in the Dao Era, and with the help of the Eternal Demon Pillar, his Eternal Dao Rank has increased a lot, but now it has slowed down.

"It's time to go to the abyss of despair!"

Ye Tian's replica body set off and headed for the abyss of despair.

As he approached the abyss of despair, he stopped, and then began to condense and copy his body.

Soon, he condensed four replica bodies, and with this one, it was five replica bodies.
